title: sonchus subbipinnatifidus
intro: Sonchus subbipinnatifidus is a species of thistle native to the mountainous regions of central Asia. It is known for its edible leaves and roots, which possess medicinal properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Sonchus subbipinnatifidus is commonly prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and its root is also used in traditional medicine to make a medicinal tea.
